Payment platform partner for Philippines venues. Enables GCash and credit card processing for court bookings and front desk payments.

Revenue split negotiation currently in progress — do not finalize venue contracts dependent on payment processing until terms are confirmed. For US payment processing, see [[stripe]].

## Deployments referencing Magpie

- [[tela-park]] — Magpie included as part of the venue setup per [KAN-2](https://kosmaskavc.atlassian.net/browse/KAN-2). Transaction fee modeled at ~5% in current SOW draft; client to reprice courts before go-live.
